title: Brotherhood (disambiguation)
content:
'''Brotherhood''' may refer to:
__NOTOC__
==[[Canon]]==
===Locations===
*'''[[Brotherhood of the Ninth Door temple]]'''

===Organizations and titles===
*'''[[Brotherhood of Cognizance]]''', a [[Religion|religious]] order based on [[Naboo]]
*'''[[Brotherhood of Darkness]]''', an [[army]] of the [[Sith]] active during the [[Fall of the Old Republic|dark age]] of the [[Galactic Republic|Old Republic]]
*'''[[Brotherhood of the Beatific Countenance]]''', a [[The Force|Force]]-based [[Lorrdian]] [[Religion|religious]] group
*'''[[Brotherhood of the Ninth Door]]''', a secretive [[Dark side of the Force|dark side]] religious sect on [[Jedha]]
*'''[[Brotherhood of Wire and Bone]]''', a cult created by [[Fyzen Gor]]
*'''[[Lantillian Spacers' Brotherhood]]''', an organization that hired freelancing [[smuggler]]s
*'''[[Red Fury Brotherhood]]''', a group of [[pirate]]s that signed terms with [[Count]] [[Dooku]] to exclusively target the [[Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars]]
*'''[[Shuxl Brotherhood]]''', a criminal gang of [[Kadas'sa'Nikto]] active on the [[planet]] [[Burnin Konn]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Organizations and titles===
*'''[[Brotherhood Mortalis]]''', a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] network
*'''[[Brotherhood of Cognizance/Legends|Brotherhood of Cognizance]]''', a monastic order of the [[Naboo religion|Naboo faith system]]
*'''[[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]]''', an organization of [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] that rose to power in the last decade of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Republic Dark Age|Dark Age]]
*'''[[Brotherhood of Independent Scouts]]''', an organization of independent [[Scout/Legends|scouts]]
*'''[[Hyperspace Navigator's Guild|Brotherhood of Navigators]]''', an organization responsible for the discovery and establishment of new [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace routes]]
*'''[[Brotherhood of the Obscene Martyr]]''', a religious organization that ran against the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]
*'''[[Brotherhood of the Sith]]''', a group of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] who broke away from the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] to study [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Sith sorcery/Legends|techniques]]
*'''[[Crimson Brotherhood]]''', a criminal organization operating on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]
*'''[[Hailstorm Brotherhood]]''', a fanatical subfaction of the [[White Maw]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]
*'''[[Lantillian Spacers' Brotherhood/Legends|Lantillian Spacers' Brotherhood]]''', a trade guild from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lantillies/Legends|Lantillies]]
*'''[[Old Tion Brotherhood]]''', a [[Spice/Legends|spice]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] organization
*'''[[Red Fury Brotherhood/Legends|Red Fury Brotherhood]]''', a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] group operating out of the [[Cularin asteroid belt]]
*'''[[Tommaba Brotherhood]]''', a scout organization comprised of natives of the destroyed [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]

===Miscellanea===
*'''[[Brotherhood badge]]''', an identification used by the [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] of the [[Red Fury Brotherhood/Legends|Red Fury Brotherhood]]
*'''[[Lantillian Spacers' Brotherhood Guildhouse]]'''
*'''[[Oath of Brotherhood: Clan Ordo]]''', an oath [[Jicoln Cadera]] swore to the [[Clan Ordo|Ordo Clan]]

==Real world==
===Canon media===
*'''[[Brotherhood (novel)|''Brotherhood'']]''', a [[2022]] novel by [[Mike Chen (author)|Mike Chen]]
**'''[[Brotherhood (audiobook)|''Brotherhood'']]''', an unabridged audiobook recording
*"'''[[Brotherhood (short story)|Brotherhood]]'''," a short story from the novel ''[[From a Certain Point of View: Return of the Jedi]]''
